description.zh: 4 种传输协议 + 结构化 IO + React Ink 终端渲染
description.en: 4 transport protocols + structured IO + React Ink terminal rendering

content.zh:
传输层初始化:
  检测运行环境...
  → 本地终端 → 使用 stdio 传输
content.en:
Transport layer initialization:
  Detecting runtime environment...
  → Local terminal → Use stdio transport

annotation.zh: 自动选择最优传输协议
用户通过 stdin 输入

content.zh:
React Ink 渲染终端 UI:
  <Box flexDirection='column'>
    <Spinner /> 正在思考...
    <ToolStatus tool='FileRead' />
  </Box>
content.en:
React Ink renders terminal UI:
  <Box flexDirection='column'>
    <Spinner /> Thinking...
    <ToolStatus tool='FileRead' />
  </Box>

annotation.zh: 终端中使用 React 组件渲染!
工具调用通过传输层发送
annotation.en: Tool call sent via transport layer

annotation.zh: 工具结果通过传输层返回
annotation.en: Tool result returned via transport layer

content.zh:
结构化 IO 输出:
{
  type: 'tool_result',
  tool: 'FileRead',
  content: '...',
  duration: 42
}
content.en:
Structured IO output:
{
  type: 'tool_result',
  tool: 'FileRead',
  content: '...',
  duration: 42
}

annotation.zh: SDK 模式: JSON 格式，机器可解析

content.zh: 代码检查完成，一切正常!
content.en: Code check complete, everything looks good!

annotation.zh: 通过 stdout 输出给用户
